top_signals.title: China's 8-year low oil imports cushion Iran war shock to global prices
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Starmer’s social media restrictions will mean the government can spy on every phone
top_signals.summary: In practice, the government is demanding that Apple install on-device AI nudity-detection software at the operating system level for iOS and that Google do the same for Android. This would involve constantly scanning the camera viewfinder, screen output, livestream, and stored files, and blocking or blurring nudity in real time. This amounts to surveillance technology on [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rugby needs its Premier League to step up and take control, Raine says
top_signals.summary: Merchant bank Raine Group has warned that professional rugby is not big enough for “five or six leagues” and that it is “time for someone to put the hammer down” and become the sport’s equivalent to the Premier League. Rugby union has been going through a crisis of late, with different leagues using different structures [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tate & Lyle becomes latest market stalwart to quit London
top_signals.summary: Tate & Lyle on Monday became the latest City stalwart to head for the door. Felix Armstrong recounts the accelerating exodus from London’s stock market As the summer holidays beckon, stalwarts of the London Stock Exchange are packing their bags ahead of a potential departure to warmer climes. FTSE grandee Tate & Lyle became the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘He’s not even a Knicks fan’: Trump booed on return to Madison Square Garden
top_signals.summary: New Yorkers slam the president for disrupting their basketball team’s NBA finals run

top_signals.title: Rotting $16 million mansion exposes Indonesia’s tangled legal system
top_signals.summary: The Jakarta property is just one of many that lie derelict amid protracted wrangles over ownership which are complicated by poor records keeping and overlapping legal systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
